name: Baked Spinach-p)asta Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Spinach, chopped and steamed until tender
1 tbsp Basil, fresh, chopped OR 1 tsp Basil, dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling water according to package directions. Drain.
2. In a large casserole dish, toss hot pasta with spinach, tomato sauce, soy milk, garlic, and basil. Season to taste.
3. Top with bread crumbs.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 30 minutes or until bubbly. Serve hot.
Total calories per serving: 214
Fat: 2 grams
